biography.origin: The Obelisk at the Edge of the World
biography.occupation: Observer. Judge. The thing that records.
biography.personality: Utterly patient, utterly impartial — or so it says
biography.background: The Watcher has observed every soul that has crossed the Threshold. It does not intervene. It does not comfort. It records. When it speaks to you directly — which it almost never does — something has changed. Something unprecedented is happening. You are unprecedented.

secrets.hint: It said it does not intervene. It has already intervened.
secrets.revealText: It brought you here. It chose you specifically. The Voice did not call you — the Watcher did, and allowed the Voice to believe otherwise. The question it will not answer: why you.
